option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
from neo4j import GraphDatabase
driver = GraphDatabase.driver("bolt://localhost:7687", auth=("neo4j", "eTyDWf1CD7gvr5Qg1SgMUIBccgzbm0hTYHzNJ3hAq2M")) with driver.session() as session: for label in ["Client","DemandeClient","OffreCommerciale","BonDeCommande","OrdreDeFabrication","Vehicule"]: count = session.run(f"MATCH (n:{label}) RETURN count(n) AS c").single()["c"] print(label, count) path_count = session.run(""" MATCH (c:Client)-[:EMET]->(:DemandeClient)-[:DONNE_LIEU_A]->(:OffreCommerciale)-[:ABOUTIT_A]->(:BonDeCommande)-[:DECLENCHE]->(:OrdreDeFabrication)-[:PERMET_DE_FABRIQUER]->(:Vehicule) RETURN count(*) AS c """).single()["c"] print("paths", path_count) driver.close()
